response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: For the first song 'Shunkan Heartbeat', the reference JSON was partially incorrect in the bridge section, but burnt-in lyrics on-screen provided the correct text. For Raden's original song 'JAPAN no Bijutsushi', the audio and JSON matched well. 2. JSON Usage: Used for disambiguating complex art historical terms and proper names in Raden's song. Discarded the erroneous bridge lyrics in the reference JSON for the first song. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed subtitles strictly to vocal bursts. For the rapid-fire list of art pieces (e.g., Jomon and Azuchi-Momoyama sections), applied aggressive truncation and instantaneous transitions to maintain synchronization and prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: ...君と出会い
subtitles.english: ...Since meeting you,

subtitles.original: からふるり彩ろう
subtitles.english: everything's colored in.

subtitles.original: 心を奪われた気まぐれな瞬間ハートビート
subtitles.english: My heart was stolen in a whimsical moment, heartbeat.

subtitles.original: よろしくの狭間 もう一人じゃない
subtitles.english: In the space of 'Nice to meet you', I'm not alone anymore.

subtitles.original: 諦める未来予想図は同じ
subtitles.english: The future I'd given up on, the vision's the same.

subtitles.original: 夢を引き寄せたよ
subtitles.english: I've drawn my dreams close.

subtitles.original: 果てしない旅路の向こうで
subtitles.english: Beyond the endless journey,

subtitles.original: 鳴り止まないロマンが待っている
subtitles.english: a never-ending romance awaits.

subtitles.original: 傷ついた時にはね
subtitles.english: When I'm feeling hurt,

subtitles.original: いつまでも君と一緒なら
subtitles.english: as long as I'm with you forever,

subtitles.original: ここから先広がる
subtitles.english: it'll spread out from here...

subtitles.original: 空高く
subtitles.english: High in the sky,

subtitles.original: 果てしなく
subtitles.english: and boundlessly,

subtitles.original: 抱きしめた未来が
subtitles.english: the future I embraced

subtitles.original: 奇跡になる
subtitles.english: becomes a miracle.

subtitles.original: 生まれた
subtitles.english: These born

subtitles.original: 思いが
subtitles.english: feelings

subtitles.original: 明日へと導くよ
subtitles.english: will lead the way to tomorrow.

subtitles.original: 私だけの光
subtitles.english: A light that's mine alone,

subtitles.original: 放ちたい
subtitles.english: I want to set it free.

subtitles.original: WOW WOW WOW...
subtitles.english: WOW WOW WOW...

subtitles.original: JAPANの美術史♪ (Art! Art!)
subtitles.english: Japanese Art History♪ (Art! Art!)

subtitles.original: JAPANの美術史♪ (絵画に立体！)
subtitles.english: Japanese Art History♪ (Painting and Sculpture!)

subtitles.original: JAPANの美術史♪ (テストもバッチリ！)
subtitles.english: Japanese Art History♪ (Ace that test!)

subtitles.original: お・ぼ・え・ま・SHOW!
subtitles.english: Let's learn it SHOW!

subtitles.original: さあ、3Dライブの途中ではございますが...
subtitles.english: Now, even though we're in the middle of a 3D live...

subtitles.original: ここで日本美術史の授業を始めたいと思います
subtitles.english: I'd like to start a Japanese art history lesson right here!

subtitles.original: は～いみなさんこんにちは！美術史を学ぶ時間です！
subtitles.english: Hello everyone! It's time to learn art history!

subtitles.original: まずは縄文・弥生・古墳まで やってみよう
subtitles.english: First, let's cover Jomon, Yayoi, and Kofun!

subtitles.original: 火焔型土器
subtitles.english: Flame-style pottery,

subtitles.original: 遮光器土偶
subtitles.english: Goggle-eyed figurine,

subtitles.original: 縄文のビーナス！
subtitles.english: Venus of Jomon!

subtitles.original: 銅鐸、銅戈、銅矛、銅剣、弥生土器
subtitles.english: Dotaku, Doka, Doko, Doken, Yayoi pottery!

subtitles.original: 埴輪も色々、踊る人々、掛甲武人、馬型埴輪
subtitles.english: Various Haniwa: Dancing People, Warrior, and Horse types!

subtitles.original: 古墳出土の鉄刀、鉄剣、七支刀に土師器 須恵器
subtitles.english: Kofun iron swords, Seven-branched sword, Hajiki and Sueki!

subtitles.original: OK OK OK OK OK いい感じ！
subtitles.english: OK OK OK OK OK, looking good!

subtitles.original: 次は飛鳥に奈良時代！ 3! 2! 1! GO!
subtitles.english: Next up: Asuka and Nara periods! 3! 2! 1! GO!

subtitles.original: 仏像いっぱい釈迦如来、菩薩と合わせて三尊像
subtitles.english: Statues of Shaka Nyorai, and the Bodhisattva Triads!

subtitles.original: 玉虫厨子、天寿国繍帳、金堂壁画、古墳壁画
subtitles.english: Tamamushi Shrine, Tenjukoku Mandara, Kondo and Kofun murals!

subtitles.original: 東大寺には奈良の大仏、興福寺には阿修羅像
subtitles.english: The Great Buddha at Todai-ji, and Ashura at Kofuku-ji!

subtitles.original: 音と一緒に遊びましょう！螺鈿紫檀五絃琵琶
subtitles.english: Let's play with sound! The Raden Shitan Five-stringed Lute!

subtitles.original: 未来のキミに届くように
subtitles.english: So that it reaches the future you,

subtitles.original: 繋いでいこう この想い
subtitles.english: let's connect these feelings.

subtitles.original: 愛さえあれば大丈夫
subtitles.english: As long as there's love, it'll be okay,

subtitles.original: 語り合う朝が来るまで
subtitles.english: until the morning we talk together comes.

subtitles.original: JAPANの美術史♪ (Art! Art!)
subtitles.english: Japanese Art History♪ (Art! Art!)

subtitles.original: JAPANの美術史♪ (絵画に立体！)
subtitles.english: Japanese Art History♪ (Painting and Sculpture!)

subtitles.original: JAPANの美術史♪ (テストもバッチリ！)
subtitles.english: Japanese Art History♪ (Ace that test!)

subtitles.original: お・ぼ・え・ま・SHOW!
subtitles.english: Let's learn it SHOW!

subtitles.original: まだまだ色々ございます 頑張ってついてきてくださいね
subtitles.english: There's still plenty more! Please try to keep up!

subtitles.original: 平安 鎌倉 南北朝 参る
subtitles.english: Heian, Kamakura, Nanboku-cho... Here we go!

subtitles.original: 曼荼羅、一木造り、寄木造り
subtitles.english: Mandala, Ichiboku-zukuri, Yosegi-zukuri!

subtitles.original: 鳥獣人物戯画に源氏物語
subtitles.english: Choju-giga and The Tale of Genji!

subtitles.original: 平等院鳳凰堂阿弥陀如来坐像
subtitles.english: The Seated Amida Buddha of the Phoenix Hall!

subtitles.original: 模様がとってもかわいい
subtitles.english: The pattern is so very cute!

subtitles.original: 片輪車螺鈿手箱！
subtitles.english: The Katawaguruma Raden Cosmetic Box!

subtitles.original: 東大寺の南大門の金剛力士像
subtitles.english: The Kongo Rikishi statues of Todai-ji's Nandaimon!

subtitles.original: 阿弥陀二十五菩薩来迎図、山越阿弥陀図
subtitles.english: Amida's Descent and Amida Rising over the Mountains!

subtitles.original: 蒙古襲来絵詞、空也上人像
subtitles.english: The Mongol Invasions scrolls, and Priest Kuya!

subtitles.original: 一遍上人絵伝、後三年合戦絵巻
subtitles.english: Ippen Shonin's biography, and the Later Three Years' War scrolls!

subtitles.original: YOYO! 半分くらい来たぜ多分！
subtitles.english: YOYO! We're about halfway through, probably!

subtitles.original: まだまだいくぜ、ありのまま 室町から安土桃山！
subtitles.english: Keep 'em coming, as they are! From Muromachi to Azuchi-Momoyama!

subtitles.original: 能面 翁に 枯山水 天橋立図 呂洞賓図
subtitles.english: Okina mask, Zen gardens, Amanohashidate, and Lu Dongbin!

subtitles.original: 狩野派の屏風！
subtitles.english: Kano school folding screens!

subtitles.original: 曜変天目茶碗
subtitles.english: Yohen Tenmoku tea bowl!

subtitles.original: 洛中洛外図屏風
subtitles.english: Scenes In and Around Kyoto screen!

subtitles.original: 唐獅子図屏風、松鷹図
subtitles.english: Chinese Lions screen and Hawks in Pines!

subtitles.original: 職人尽図、花下遊楽図、松林図、山水図
subtitles.english: Craftsmen, Merrymaking, Pine Trees, and Landscapes!

subtitles.original: 八橋蒔絵螺鈿硯箱 本物だー！
subtitles.english: The Yatsuhashi Raden Writing Box! It's the real thing!

subtitles.original: 未来のキミに届くように
subtitles.english: So that it reaches the future you,

subtitles.original: 繋いでいこう この想い
subtitles.english: let's connect these feelings.

subtitles.original: 愛さえあれば大丈夫
subtitles.english: As long as there's love, it'll be okay,

subtitles.original: 語り合う朝が来るまで
subtitles.english: until the morning we talk together comes.

subtitles.original: と、なんと今回特別に バーチャル八橋蒔絵螺鈿硯箱さんに来ていただきました！
subtitles.english: And now, as a special treat, the Virtual Yatsuhashi Writing Box is here!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you very much!

subtitles.original: さあ、最後、江戸時代から昭和まで！ 行きますよ！
subtitles.english: Now for the finale, from Edo to Showa! Here we go!

subtitles.original: 舟橋蒔絵硯箱、風神雷神図屏風
subtitles.english: Funabashi Writing Box, Wind and Thunder Gods screen!

subtitles.original: 燕子花図屏風、見返り美人
subtitles.english: Irises screen and Beauty Looking Back!

subtitles.original: 好色一代男、奥の細道
subtitles.english: Life of an Amorous Man, Narrow Road to the Deep North!
